title: "Shop" Skill Sae Areba, Dungeon-ka Shita Sekai demo Rakushou da: Hakugai Sareta Shounen no Saikyou Zamaa Life

en.title: Told To Leave It Alone, But I Can't Just Ignore It...
i was Good and Lived through half of the sad days.
We Must Not Forget The Resolve We Had That Day.
Don't Forget To Cook Something For Your Cute Lil Sis.
Don't Judge The Abilities Of Big Breasts
Don't get used to the new world.
Don't Run Away Like That Day.
"Do not get too excited In love talk"
